source.body_text_sample:

Evoke Health - The connection you can count on
Our Mission

To empower healthcare providers to serve their residents better.

Our Vision

Quick, easy, secure, and barrier-free access to health care resources for everyone.

Our Values
Innovation

We are constanlty innovating on what matters most to our customers. We are scrappy, audacious, and committed to digitizing healthcare.

Transparency

We foster a culture of openness with our team and customers. We welcome differing opinions, and believe in "disagree and commit" to move forward.

Empowerment

Everything we do is to empower our customers to excel at their jobs, while continuing to challenge ourselves to grow and improve every day.

Pragmatic & Swift

We are pragmatic problem solvers. We root decisions in data, logic, and intuition, while valuing speed and action.

Our story

Evoke Health is the brainchild of two engineers, Varsha Chaugai and Graham Fraser, founded on a simple yet powerful belief: that healthcare should be accessible, transparent, and empowering for patients, families, and care teams alike.

Engage+ , Evoke Health's flagship resident and family portal has been developed to bring this vision to life. We believe that providing families with access to their loved ones’ health and wellness data along with an easy way to communicate with healthcare professionals in Long-Term Care homes will facilitate
